[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110101 4
1 11011000 4
2 10100010 3
3 01001010 3
4 01101000 3
5 00110100 3
6 11011110 6
7 11110010 5

01 10 11011110 6 match 6
12 21 11110100 5
23 32 10110111 6
34 43 11011111 7
45 54 11101011 6
56 65 10101101 5
67 76 10001101 4
70 07 10001111 5
